fragility_points: A sharp SOL reversal into the low 80s would cut the wick probability materially.
If repeated retests fail below 89-90 with shrinking range, the current estimate is too high.
key_assumptions: A near-threshold SOL market can still print a brief 1-minute wick above 90 without sustaining a breakout.
Short-horizon SOL volatility remains high enough over the remaining days to allow a 1-2% upside extension.
main_logical_chain: Interpret the contract narrowly: only Binance SOL/USDT 1-minute highs count.
Check the governed Binance series directly and confirm that no touch has happened yet, with max observed high 89.15.
Apply outside-view logic: a volatile crypto asset already within about 1-2% of a round-number barrier with several days left has a meaningful touch chance.
Discount the market somewhat because near-threshold touch markets are often overread as nearly inevitable before the final marginal move actually occurs.
main_thesis: SOL is close enough to $90 that a brief Binance wick before April 19 is slightly more likely than not, but the market still overprices that path because no qualifying touch has happened yet.
quote_anchors: This market will immediately resolve to "Yes" if any Binance 1-minute candle for SOL/USDT ... has a final "High" price equal to or greater than the price specified in the title.
Max observed Binance 1-minute high in the checked live window: 89.15.
source_quality_view: Good for this contract: one primary governing rules source plus one direct governing exchange-data verification source; ambiguity is low once the rules are read carefully.
strongest_disconfirmers: No qualifying Binance touch had occurred yet in the checked April 13-16 window.
The last 14 daily Binance candles had zero highs at or above 90, suggesting the threshold is not trivially easy in the current local regime.
strongest_supports: The contract resolves on any Binance SOL/USDT 1-minute High >= 90, so only a brief wick is needed.
Direct Binance checks showed SOL trading around 88.96 with a live-window max high of 89.15, putting the threshold within about 1-2%.
timing_relevance: High; this is a date-bounded touch market and the estimate depends heavily on the few remaining days after the research check.
unresolved_ambiguities: How much realized volatility remains from April 17-19.
Whether current 89-ish trading is staging for breakout or just another rejection zone.
what_would_change_view: I would move up if a fresh verification pass shows a touch or stronger sustained trading above 89; I would move down if SOL reverses materially or keeps failing below 89-90 with narrowing range.
